parameters.query:
SELECT
  id,
  name,
  search_filters->>'companyContext'  AS company_context,
  search_filters->>'servicesContext' AS services_context,
  search_filters->'includeKeywords'  AS include_keywords,
  search_filters->'excludeKeywords'  AS exclude_keywords
FROM monitoring_projects
WHERE id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.projectId }};

nodes.name: Если поля ручного ввода пустые, заполним их

parameters.query:
UPDATE monitoring_projects
SET
  search_filters = COALESCE(search_filters, '{}'::jsonb)
    || jsonb_strip_nulls(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'companyContext',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM(search_filters->>'companyContext'), '') IS NULL
            AND NULLIF(
              BTRIM(($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiCompanyContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')),
              ''
            ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiCompanyContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'servicesContext',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(BTRIM(search_filters->>'servicesContext'), '') IS NULL
            AND NULLIF(
              BTRIM(($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiServicesContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')),
              ''
            ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiServicesContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'includeKeywords',
        CASE
          WHEN (
            jsonb_typeof(search_filters->'includeKeywords') IS DISTINCT FROM 'array'
            OR COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(search_filters->'includeKeywords'), 0) = 0
          )
          AND COALESCE(
            jsonb_array_length(
              $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
            ),
            0
          ) > 0
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'excludeKeywords',
        CASE
          WHEN (
            jsonb_typeof(search_filters->'excludeKeywords') IS DISTINCT FROM 'array'
            OR COALESCE(jsonb_array_length(search_filters->'excludeKeywords'), 0) = 0
          )
          AND COALESCE(
            jsonb_array_length(
              $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiExcludeKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
            ),
            0
          ) > 0
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiExcludeKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END
      )
    ),
  filters_version = COALESCE(filters_version, 0) + 1
WHERE id = {{ $('Webhook').item.json.body.projectId }};

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ Number($('Webhook2').item.json.body.projectId) }}::bigint AS project_id,

    NULLIF(
      BTRIM(
        ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.lead_search_prompt || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
      ),
      ''
    ) AS lead_search_prompt,

    NULLIF(
      BTRIM(
        ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.outreach_message_template || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
      ),
      ''
    ) AS outreach_message_template,

    jsonb_strip_nulls(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'aiKeywords',
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(
            jsonb_array_length(
              $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
            ),
            0
          ) > 0
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiExcludeKeywords',
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(
            jsonb_array_length(
              $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiExcludeKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
            ),
            0
          ) > 0
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiExcludeKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiPromptText',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
            BTRIM(
              ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiPromptText || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
            ),
            ''
          ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiPromptText || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiCompanyContext',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
            BTRIM(
              ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiCompanyContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
            ),
            ''
          ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiCompanyContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiServicesContext',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
            BTRIM(
              ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiServicesContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
            ),
            ''
          ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript1').item.json.search_filters?.aiServicesContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END
      )
    ) AS search_filters_patch
)

UPDATE monitoring_projects mp
SET
  lead_search_prompt = COALESCE(input.lead_search_prompt, mp.lead_search_prompt),
  outreach_message_template = COALESCE(input.outreach_message_template, mp.outreach_message_template),
  search_filters = COALESCE(mp.search_filters, '{}'::jsonb) || input.search_filters_patch,
  filters_version = CASE
    WHEN input.search_filters_patch <> '{}'::jsonb
    THEN COALESCE(mp.filters_version, 0) + 1
    ELSE mp.filters_version
  END
FROM input
WHERE mp.id = input.project_id
RETURNING mp.*;

WITH input AS (
  SELECT
    {{ Number($('Webhook').item.json.body.projectId) }}::bigint AS project_id,

    NULLIF(
      BTRIM(
        ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.lead_search_prompt || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
      ),
      ''
    ) AS lead_search_prompt,

    NULLIF(
      BTRIM(
        ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.outreach_message_template || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
      ),
      ''
    ) AS outreach_message_template,

    jsonb_strip_nulls(
      jsonb_build_object(
        'aiKeywords',
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(
            jsonb_array_length(
              $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
            ),
            0
          ) > 0
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiExcludeKeywords',
        CASE
          WHEN COALESCE(
            jsonb_array_length(
              $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiExcludeKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
            ),
            0
          ) > 0
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiExcludeKeywords || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiPromptText',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
            BTRIM(
              ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiPromptText || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
            ),
            ''
          ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiPromptText || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiCompanyContext',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
            BTRIM(
              ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiCompanyContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
            ),
            ''
          ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiCompanyContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END,

        'aiServicesContext',
        CASE
          WHEN NULLIF(
            BTRIM(
              ($n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiServicesContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb #>> '{}')
            ),
            ''
          ) IS NOT NULL
          THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.search_filters?.aiServicesContext || '') }}$n8n$::jsonb
          ELSE NULL
        END
      )
    ) AS search_filters_patch,

    CASE
      WHEN jsonb_typeof(
        $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.score_filters || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
      ) = 'array'
      AND COALESCE(
        jsonb_array_length(
          $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.score_filters || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
        ),
        0
      ) > 0
      THEN $n8n${{ JSON.stringify($('Code in JavaScript').item.json.score_filters || []) }}$n8n$::jsonb
      ELSE NULL
    END AS score_filters_patch
)

UPDATE monitoring_projects mp
SET
  lead_search_prompt = COALESCE(input.lead_search_prompt, mp.lead_search_prompt),
  outreach_message_template = COALESCE(input.outreach_message_template, mp.outreach_message_template),
  search_filters = COALESCE(mp.search_filters, '{}'::jsonb) || input.search_filters_patch,
  score_filters = COALESCE(input.score_filters_patch, mp.score_filters),
  filters_version = CASE
    WHEN input.search_filters_patch <> '{}'::jsonb
      OR input.score_filters_patch IS NOT NULL
    THEN COALESCE(mp.filters_version, 0) + 1
    ELSE mp.filters_version
  END
FROM input
WHERE mp.id = input.project_id
RETURNING mp.*;
